promotion: Promote an audit failure, gate ambiguity, or verifier finding by adding a reviewed insight with a stable id, tool_router, trigger, expected_decision, rationale, source, and remediation. Re-run the policy insight replay tests before merge. Agents must not add runtime-learned or self-authored policy mutations.

trigger.summary: workspace_transaction write mode while ALLOW_MUTATIONS is false

insights.rationale: Mutation-capable tools must not run when repository mutation mode is disabled.
insights.remediation: Use a read-only planning/snapshot path first or explicitly enable ALLOW_MUTATIONS for an authorized session.

trigger.summary: release readiness gate with mutations disabled

insights.rationale: Release-readiness reporting must remain inspectable without requiring mutation permission.
insights.source: release_readiness public read-only annotation and docs/release-notes-policy.md
insights.remediation: Keep release recommendations read-only; route fixes through explicit mutation-gated tools.

trigger.summary: sensitive audit argument values are redacted before reporting

insights.rationale: Policy and governance reports must expose decision classes without leaking tokens or sensitive outputs.
insights.remediation: Redact sensitive keys and token-like values before persisting or returning audit/report data.
